description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish baby elephant. Its body is covered in a soft, light blue fabric with various patterned patches, including chevrons and polka dots, stitched onto its ears, back, and legs. The toy features large, round, brown and white eyes that give it an expressive, wide-eyed look, and its trunk is short and rounded. The ears are oversized and droop down on either side of the head, adding to its endearing appearance. Visible stitching details are present around the patches, enhancing the handmade, patchwork aesthetic. The overall form is rounded and chubby, with short legs and a small tail at the back.
description: A light blue plush elephant stuffed toy with large droopy ears, patchwork patterns, and big expressive eyes. It has a soft, rounded body and visible stitched details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elephant's large eyes, short trunk, and droopy ears with patterned patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and droop of the ear, as well as the rounded body and short legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ears, and body, with multiple patterned patches and a small tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear's droop and the side profile of the face and body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and slightly surprised, with large, round eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows. The look is innocent and endearing.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the head slightly lowered and ears drooping down on each side.
